messages: ✅ Model appears to be well-fitted! Average R² = 0.9567, R² variance = 0.1001. Performance is consistent across train/validation/test sets.
ℹ️ Note: R² scores vary by 0.100 across datasets. This might indicate: (1) small dataset size, (2) data distribution differences, or (3) random variation.
ℹ️ Test and validation losses differ by 1926.3%. This is normal for small datasets but monitor if using for production.
